data.name: 冒險家協會的性生活
data.detailed_description:
《冒險家協會的性生活》

「運用魔法和法術的各種NTR性愛！

利用工會員工的便器，享受著為了老公而無法反抗的基拉和西塞露的身體！
在老公為了冒險者測驗而去單人挑戰的一小會里馬上做愛，中出，讓老公昏睡，在他身邊調教肉便器，為了得到被人類操才能得到的魅力而進行性指導，為了讓老公開心而上的螃蟹舞蹈課，運用轉移摩擦卡在牆上，只用上半身和老公對話，在化身為獸人，無法意識到老公的老公面前做愛，透明化之後在老公面前出軌做愛，你喜歡的色情改造裝備，NTR報告受精，NTR懷孕的低俗玩物奴隸生活等種種，深愛老公的兩人在肉慾PLAY之中成為低俗的M玩物！

「好強的暗黑妖精和高貴的妖精，從她們的老公身邊NTR兩人！」

沒有任何行性知識，老公過於不成熟而得不到滿足的她們，對你表現出嫌棄的同時成為了你雞雞的奴隸，變成了抖M母狗！
為了老公，隨你開心！這是何等的鬥志啊。但還是因為變態行為和眼前的雞雞而彎腰，小穴濕漉。 ！一被操，就發出讓人不覺得是妖精的母狗聲！

「還有懷孕後的低俗樣子！」

懷上你的孩子，享受和色氣全開的兩個M妖精的做愛生活！好強高貴，要強的妖精和暗黑妖精母狗化，徹底侍奉的也有哦！

高貴妖精和要強暗黑妖精的聲音！

盡情享受高貴的妖精，要強的暗黑妖精的小穴被你操著，成為了你的玩物，變得滿嘴淫語，低俗嬌喘等各種反差音效！




  • 官方漢化版
  • 高清16:9和4:3圖質。
  • 幾小時的內容。
  • 所有美女帶原版日文語音。
  • 帶有角色動態。
  • 帶有收藏展覽。


「冒險家協會的性生活」由著名日本製作室 Miel所創作,並由櫻桃吻吻正式漢化, 把日本遊戲帶到全世界。

**注意**
所有角色的描述和圖片都屬成人並沒有任何未成年人物用於這遊戲裡。

data.name: Elf Wives Cheat to Ride my Meat
data.detailed_description:
You used to be an adventurer like them, until you took an arrow to the knee. Spending your days issuing quests instead of going on them has its perks, like seeing the two strongest and sexiest members everyday. The only downside is that they always bring their stupid husbands along to spoil your lewd fantasies... Unable to watch these sexy elves flirt with their husband’s day in and day out, you get to work looking for an opportunity to get yourself a piece of that elf booty!

Your chance comes when Keira's husband is trying to rank up with the guild and you seize the opportunity by convincing Keira to let you give her a ride on your monster meat to fast track her husband's adventurer evaluation. He'll be delving deep into the dungeon for dozens of days while you use that time to pour all that pent up frustration into her pussy! Keira, exhausted from your insatiable apatite for dark elf pussy, ends up tricking the pure Sissel into sleeping with you to take a literal load off herself. With a lie that “sleeping with the guild clerk will help her discover the ‘joy of sex’ and help her have a happy marriage”, you'll show her the joy of sex alright.

With these two banging elf wives wrapped around your finger, you'll have your work cut out if you want to turn Keira and Sissel from loving wives to mind-broken cock craving sluts! After all, who wants to be an adventurer when getting to fuck two sexy married elves is a way better reward than money or EXP!


  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • Keira and Sissel are fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Hours of story content
  • Audio including music and special effects
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections
  • 20 scenes of pure elf corruption.

Elf Wives Cheat to Ride my Meat! Is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

** PLEASE NOTE **
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.
